subcategory: fashion product card with 3D tilt effect
use_cases: Displaying fashion or e-commerce product information with interactive 3D tilt effects
Creating visually engaging product showcases with badges for sales, new items, or exclusive offers
Building product grids and catalogs with responsive design that adapts to different aspect ratios
ai_summary: An interactive fashion card featuring 3D tilt effects on mouse movement, customizable badges for product status, and support for multiple aspect ratios. Ideal for modern e-commerce interfaces that want to showcase products with engaging visual effects.
